title: LINES OF PLAY | Group Art Exhibition (30+ Artists)
description: World Cup-themed group exhibition featuring 30+ artists. Perfect for art-loving couples who want to explore Atlanta's creative scene together. Great conversation starter and Instagram-worthy moments.

title: Afro Beat & Caribbean Vibes Night
description: Tropical vibes night featuring the best of Afrobeat and Caribbean music. Heat up your date night with sizzling rhythms and island energy. Great for couples who love to dance and enjoy diverse music.

title: Salsa Bachata Havana Nights
description: Atlanta's premier Latin dance night with salsa and bachata classes, food, and dancing. Every Sunday! Perfect date activity - learn to dance together, then hit the floor. Romantic and energetic.

title: Jess Hilarious Standup Comedy
description: Comedy superstar Jess Hilarious brings the laughs. Great date night - nothing beats shared laughter! Order drinks, enjoy the show, and bond over the humor.

title: QUATRE: Jazz Jam Night
description: Four incredible jazz musicians (Tyrone Jackson, Chris Burroughs, Joel Powell, Joe Gransden) deliver an intimate night of live jazz. Cozy venue perfect for conversation and connection.

title: Art of the Game Opening Reception
description: Opening reception celebrating gaming and art. Unique gallery experience with wine and mingling. Great for creative couples who enjoy contemporary art and cultural events.

title: Vegan Takeover at Kamayan Filipino Restaurant
description: Plant-based Filipino feast! Unique foodie adventure for couples willing to explore bold flavors. Instagram-worthy dishes and great conversation about food. Reservation recommended.

title: STAMPED: AYA x Friends - Amapiano & Afrobeats
description: Atlanta's hottest Amapiano and Afrobeats party! Great vibes, music, and dancing. Perfect for couples who love to get moving to African-influenced beats. Early arrival recommended.

title: Moms Unhinged Standup Comedy Show
location: Wild Heaven Beer - West End Brewery & Gardens, Atlanta
description: Hilarious standup in a fun brewery setting. Great for couples who appreciate wit and humor. Craft beers and food available. Casual, relaxed vibe.

title: Tropical Latin Night Atlanta
description: Get the weekend started with tropical Latin rhythms! Dancing, vibes, and energy. Great for couples who love to dance and enjoy nightclub atmosphere.

title: Friday Night Traffic Jam & Jokes: Young Gunnas of Comedy
description: Rising comedy stars bring the heat! Great laughs and fun energy. Perfect for couples looking for entertainment beyond the typical date night.

title: Juneteenth Atlanta Parade and Music Festival
description: 14th Annual celebration! Parade, live music, food vendors, and community. Great for couples who enjoy cultural events, live music, and supporting local celebrations.

title: Reggae on the Rooftop Festival - Juneteenth Weekend
location: AIR ROOFROP (formerly Suite Lounge), Atlanta, GA
description: Rooftop reggae vibes with live music, food, and good times. Perfect for couples who love outdoor festivals, reggae music, and unique Atlanta venues.

title: Vinyl Sessions: June Edition
description: Twelve installment of this cool vinyl listening session. Great date activity - enjoy music, food, and the intimate atmosphere of record listening. Unique experience!

title: Waiting to Exhale Dinner Series Volume 1
description: Thoughtfully curated dinner experience. Perfect for couples who appreciate fine dining, good conversation, and unique culinary experiences. Makes for an unforgettable date night.

title: Salsa Bachata Havana Nights
description: Sunday Latin dance party with lessons and open dancing. Great for couples who want to learn or practice salsa and bachata. Romantic, fun, and keeps you moving!

title: Vegan Soul Sunday - Fathers Day Edition
location: New Life Presbyterian Church, Atlanta, GA
description: Community vegan food event with vendors and good vibes. Great for couples interested in plant-based eating, community events, and supporting local food culture.

title: Spyro Gyra Live at City Winery
location: City Winery Atlanta, 650 North Ave NE, Atlanta
description: Legendary jazz fusion band Spyro Gyra performs live! Perfect date night - enjoy wine, gourmet food, and world-class music in an upscale setting. Romantic and memorable.

title: Bachatuesdays at Taverna Plaka
description: Weekly Tuesday bachata night! Free entry, great music, and dancing. Perfect for couples looking for a fun weeknight date or to practice their dance moves.

title: ROOTS + REMIX: Art, Design, Identity & Sound
description: An evening celebrating art, design, identity, and sound. Live music, art installations, and cultural expression. Perfect for creative couples who appreciate multidisciplinary art events.
